raw_consumer_statement: I had planned travel to XXXX. I reserved a rental car with a company called XXXX XXXX XXXX  ( XXXX as the merchant is listed on my credit card statement. ) The terms of the reservation were clear, that if I canceled before XXXX days prior to the trip, I would get a full refund. I had to cancel my trip. I canceled the trip with the merchant more than 30 days in advance, well prior to the XXXX day minimum. I contacted the merchant. The merchant told me in writing that I deserved a full refund. I have a copy of the email. I have sent this to the credit card company Barclays. They rejected my dispute. I have also sent them the well documented in published terms off the merchant 's. Barclays will not return my calls. Since they have rejected my claim, there is no way to communicate with their customer service team through their website. There is no chat service available. There is no document upload for record keeping available since the dispute is closed by them. I have called them every other day for the past XXXX weeks and I have not received a response. I only received a standard response from the customer service agent that someone will get back to me which never. I've sent information via fax as well as via mail with no response. I have also called the merchant to see if he could credit the charge and he is unable to do so. The credit card company is Barclays Jet Blue Credit Card and the Merchant is XXXX XXXX XXXX
